strengths: 15+ years in software engineering with full-stack, infrastructure, and AI-agent infrastructure experience
Proven entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating product-building and leadership
Recognized expertise in AI-agent workflows (MCP code generators, developer tooling) relevant to cloud/AI strategy
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product or platform built (only AI-agent infrastructure contribution noted)
Master's/PhD in AI-related field not listed; education is in Computer Science and Photography
No clear evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on cutting-edge cloud/AI technologies
response.justification: The candidate meets the 15-year experience requirement and has relevant AI-agent infrastructure experience (re:cinq), but lacks documented AI/ML products or advisory roles for strategic customers. Entrepreneurial work (GISCollective) is strong, but not directly tied to AI strategy. The resume emphasizes coding and tooling over strategic innovation.
